description: CompositionWhite and black shoes made of high peel PU, with textile lining and TPU outsoleshoe care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washLook stylish on the racetrack or off it with this pair of white and black shoes from fila. The cool white uppers with the black and silver detailing add extra style and provide a snug Fit. The TPR outsole with the grooved pattern enhances traction, making it a must-have.
